stemHtml: In order to follow a magnetic track of 230º, an aircraft is flying on a magnetic heading of 240º due to drift. The current QDM to the VOR station is 236º. Is the aircraft considered to be established on course?

options.a: Yes, our desired and true bearing are less than 5º.
options.b: No, our magnetic heading and desired bearing are more than 5º.
options.c: No, our desired and true bearing is more than 5º.
options.d: Yes, our heading and desired bearing are less than 5º.
